g.title: Coupling element between two rotor nodes. Models the connection between shafts with mass, inertia, stiffness and damping in 6 DOF. Connects the left node (l) to the right node (r).
m_l: mass on left side [kg] m_r: mass on right side [kg] Mass distribution between the two nodes
Ip_l, Ip_r: polar inertia (left/right) [kg·m²] Id_l, Id_r: diametral inertia (left/right) [kg·m²] Inertia distribution at both nodes
kt_x: translational stiffness in x kt_y: translational stiffness in y kt_z: translational stiffness in z (axial) Resistance to relative displacement
kr_x: rotational stiffness in x kr_y: rotational stiffness in y kr_z: rotational stiffness in z (torsional) Resistance to relative rotation between nodes
ct_x: translational damping in x ct_y: translational damping in y ct_z: translational damping in z
cr_x: rotational damping in x cr_y: rotational damping in y cr_z: rotational damping in z
Mass matrix [8×8] Combines m_l, m_r, Id_l, Id_r at left and right nodes
Stiffness matrix [8×8] Combines kt_x/y/z and kr_x/y/z Couples the two coupling nodes
Damping matrix [8×8] Combines ct_x/y/z and cr_x/y/z
Gyroscopic matrix [8×8] Gyroscopic effect of Ip_l and Ip_r
Coupling element between two rotor nodes. Models the connection between shafts with mass, inertia, stiffness and damping in 6 DOF. Connects the left node (l) to the right node (r).
m_l: mass on left side [kg] m_r: mass on right side [kg] Mass distribution between the two nodes
Ip_l, Ip_r: polar inertia (left/right) [kg·m²] Id_l, Id_r: diametral inertia (left/right) [kg·m²] Inertia distribution at both nodes
kt_x: translational stiffness in x kt_y: translational stiffness in y kt_z: translational stiffness in z (axial) Resistance to relative displacement
kr_x: rotational stiffness in x kr_y: rotational stiffness in y kr_z: rotational stiffness in z (torsional) Resistance to relative rotation between nodes
ct_x: translational damping in x ct_y: translational damping in y ct_z: translational damping in z
cr_x: rotational damping in x cr_y: rotational damping in y cr_z: rotational damping in z
Mass matrix [8×8] Combines m_l, m_r, Id_l, Id_r at left and right nodes
Stiffness matrix [8×8] Combines kt_x/y/z and kr_x/y/z Couples the two coupling nodes
Damping matrix [8×8] Combines ct_x/y/z and cr_x/y/z
Gyroscopic matrix [8×8] Gyroscopic effect of Ip_l and Ip_r
